# Design a translator from a code given by the path in K-map to Excess-3 code


| \            | $x_{1}x_{0}$ |     |     |     |
| ------------ | ------------ | --- | --- | --- |
| $x_{3}x_{2}$ | 00           | 01  | 11  | 10  |
| 00           |              |     |     | 0   |
| 01           | 4            | 3   | 2   | 1   |
| 11           | 5            | 6   | 7   | 8   |
| 10           |              |     |     | 9   |
---> Excess-3


|     | $x_{3}x_{2}x_{1}x_{0}$ | $Z_{3}Z_{2}Z_{1}Z_{0}$ |
| --- | ---------------------- | ---------------------- |
| 0   | 0010                   | 0011                   |
| 1   | 0110                   | 0100                   |
| 2   | 0111                   | 0101                   |
| 3   | 0101                   | 0110                   |
| 4   | 0100                   | ==0111==               |
| 5   | 1100                   | 1000                   |
| 6   | 1101                   | 1001                   |
| 7   | 1111                   | 1010                   |
| 8   | 1110                   | 1011                   |
| 9   | 1010                   | 1100                   |


| \            | $x_{1}x_{0}$ |     |     |     |
| ------------ | ------------ | --- | --- | --- |
| $x_{3}x_{2}$ | 00           | 01  | 11  | 10  |
| 00           |              |     |     | 0   |
| 01           | 0            | 0   | 0   | 0   |
| 11           | 1            | 1   | 1   | 1   |
| 10           |              |     |     | 1   |
$Z_{3}=x_{3}$

| \            | $x_{1}x_{0}$ |     |     |     |
| ------------ | ------------ | --- | --- | --- |
| $x_{3}x_{2}$ | 00           | 01  | 11  | 10  |
| 00           |              |     |     | 0   |
| 01           | 1            | 1   | 1   | 1   |
| 11           | 0            | 0   | 0   | 0   |
| 10           |              |     |     | 1   |
$Z_{2}=\bar{x_{3}}x_{2}+x_{3}\bar{x_{2}}$

| \            | $x_{1}x_{0}$ |     |     |     |
| ------------ | ------------ | --- | --- | --- |
| $x_{3}x_{2}$ | 00           | 01  | 11  | 10  |
| 00           |              |     |     | 1   |
| 01           | 1            | 1   | 0   | 0   |
| 11           | 0            | 0   | 1   | 1   |
| 10           |              |     |     | 0   |
$Z_{1}=\bar{x_{3}}\bar{x_{2}}+\bar{x_{3}}\bar{x_{1}}+x_{3}x_{2}x_{1}$

| \            | $x_{1}x_{0}$ |     |     |     |
| ------------ | ------------ | --- | --- | --- |
| $x_{3}x_{2}$ | 00           | 01  | 11  | 10  |
| 00           |              |     |     | 1   |
| 01           | 1            | 0   | 1   | 0   |
| 11           | 0            | 1   | 0   | 1   |
| 10           |              |     |     | 0   |
$Z_{0}=\bar{x_{3}}\bar{x_{2}}+\bar{x_{3}}\bar{x_{1}}\bar{x_{0}}+\bar{x_{3}}x_{1}x_{0}+x_{3}\bar{x_{1}}x_{0}+x_{3}x_{2}x_{1}\bar{x_{0}}$

# Design an encoder of Aiken's code

|     | 1-out-of-10                                          |     | Aiken's code           |     |
| --- | ---------------------------------------------------- | --- | ---------------------- | --- |
|     | $x_{9}x_{8}x_{7}x_{6}x_{5}x_{4}x_{3}x_{2}x_{1}x_{0}$ |     | $Z_{3}Z_{2}Z_{1}Z_{0}$ |     |
| 0   | 0000000001                                           |     | 0000                   |     |
| 1   | 0000000010                                           |     | 0001                   |     |
| 2   | 0000000100                                           |     | 0010                   |     |
| 3   | 0000001000                                           |     | 0011                   |     |
| 4   | 0000100000                                           |     | ==0100==               |     |
| 5   | 0000100000                                           |     | 1011                   |     |
| 6   | 0001000000                                           |     | 1100                   |     |
| 7   | 0010000000                                           |     | 1101                   |     |
| 8   | 0100000000                                           |     | 1110                   |     |
| 9   | 1000000000                                           |     | 1111                   |     |
$Z_{3}=x_{5}+x_{6}+x_{7}+x_{8}+x_{9}$
$Z_{2}=x_{4}+x_{6}+x_{7}+x_{8}+x_{9}$
$Z_{1}=x_{2}+x_{3}+x_{5}+x_{8}+x_{9}$
$Z_{0}=x_{1}+x_{3}+x_{5}+x_{7}+x_{9}$

# Decoder of Aiken's code
|     | Aiken's code           |     | 1-out-of-10                                          |
| --- | ---------------------- | --- | ---------------------------------------------------- |
|     | $X_{3}X_{2}X_{1}X_{0}$ |     | $Z_{9}Z_{8}Z_{7}Z_{6}Z_{5}Z_{4}Z_{3}Z_{2}Z_{1}Z_{0}$ |
| 0   | 0000                   |     | 0000000001                                           |
| 1   | 0001                   |     | 0000000010                                           |
| 2   | 0010                   |     | 0000000100                                           |
| 3   | 0011                   |     | 0000001000                                           |
| 4   | ==0100==               |     | 0000100000                                           |
| 5   | 1011                   |     | 0000100000                                           |
| 6   | 1100                   |     | 0001000000                                           |
| 7   | 1101                   |     | 0010000000                                           |
| 8   | 1110                   |     | 0100000000                                           |
| 9   | 1111                   |     | 1000000000                                           |

| \            | $x_{1}x_{0}$ |     |     |     |
| ------------ | ------------ | --- | --- | --- |
| $x_{3}x_{2}$ | 00           | 01  | 11  | 10  |
| 00           | 0            | 0   | 0   | 0   |
| 01           | 0            |     |     |     |
| 11           | 0            | 0   | 1   | 0   |
| 10           |              |     | 0   |     |
$Z_{9}$

| \            | $x_{1}x_{0}$ |     |     |     |
| ------------ | ------------ | --- | --- | --- |
| $x_{3}x_{2}$ | 00           | 01  | 11  | 10  |
| 00           |              |     |     |     |
| 01           |              | -   | -   | -   |
| 11           |              |     |     | 1   |
| 10           | -            | -   |     | -   |
$Z_{8}$

| \            | $x_{1}x_{0}$ |     |     |     |
| ------------ | ------------ | --- | --- | --- |
| $x_{3}x_{2}$ | 00           | 01  | 11  | 10  |
| 00           |              |     |     |     |
| 01           |              | -   | -   | -   |
| 11           |              | 1   |     |     |
| 10           | -            | -   |     | -   |
$Z_{7}$
.
.
.

| \            | $x_{1}x_{0}$ |     |     |     |
| ------------ | ------------ | --- | --- | --- |
| $x_{3}x_{2}$ | 00           | 01  | 11  | 10  |
| 00           | 1            |     |     |     |
| 01           |              | -   | -   | -   |
| 11           |              |     |     |     |
| 10           | -            | -   |     | -   |
$Z_{0}$

---
$Z_{9}=x_{2}x_{1}x_{0}$
$Z_{8}=x_{3}x_{1}\bar{x_{0}}$
$Z_{7}=x_{3}\bar{x_{1}}\bar{x_{0}}$
.
.
.
$Z_{0}=\bar{x_{2}}\bar{x_{1}}\bar{x_{0}}$


| \            | $x_{1}x_{0}$ |     |     |     |
| ------------ | ------------ | --- | --- | --- |
| $x_{3}x_{2}$ | 00           | 01  | 11  | 10  |
| 00           | 0            | 1   | 3   | 2   |
| 01           | 4            |     |     |     |
| 11           | 6            | 7   | 8   | 9   |
| 10           |              |     | 5   |     |
$Z_{9}=x_{2}x_{1}x_{0}$
$Z_{8}=x_{3}x_{1}\bar{x_{0}}$
$Z_{7}=x_{3}\bar{x_{1}}\bar{x_{0}}$
.
.
.
$Z_{0}=\bar{x_{2}}\bar{x_{1}}\bar{x_{0}}$
